name: Biene Amelion
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing lower-class clothing - a coarse linen shirt, coarse linens, and oiled linen shoes. Armed with an iron dagger.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: blademaster, peaceful, troubled, victim, daughter, debt-ridden
Role: Biene Amelion is a blademaster living in Water's Edge. She first contacts the Fighters Guild for help resolving her father's financial debt situation. Her quiet life is tragically cut short when she becomes the victim of a misguided mercenary quest during which the Blackwood Company kills her and replaces her with a goblin. She carries an iron dagger and a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Her farmhouse in Water's Edge.
Daily Routine: Before her death, Biene lives a quiet, simple life. She takes a two-hour meal at midday and another at 6pm. The rest of her time is spent relaxing inside her farmhouse. She never sleeps. This routine ends during the Infiltration quest when she is killed by the Blackwood Company.
Personality - The Tragic Debtor: Biene is living with the burden of her father's financial troubles, leading her to seek help from the Fighters Guild. She lives a peaceful, quiet existence in Water's Edge before becoming an innocent victim of the Blackwood Company's brutal methods. Depending on how her debt quest is resolved, she either manages to pay off her debts by selling her family sword and armor, or the items are kept by those who helped her - either way, her story ends tragically when she's murdered and replaced by a goblin.
author: Bethesda
